chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 7133 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Nazir report dated 12.12.2022. 2. For hearing of CMA No.32288/2022. 3. For hearing of CMA No.30161/2022. 4. For hearing of main case. 27.03.2025 Rana Sakhawat Ali, advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Khalid Rajpar, advocate for the respondent No.3. Qazi Umair Ali, advocate holding brief for Mr. Aga Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent No.2. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. It is jointly stated that the subject matter of this petition is squarely covered by a judgment of Division Bench of this Court reported as 2020 P.T.D. 1952 (Qasim International Container Terminal Pakistan Ltd. & others v. Federation of Pakistan & others), therefore, the present petition may be disposed of in reliance upon the reasoning and rationale so illumined. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
